final:
I've fixed the `total()` function in `solution.py`. The issue was that it was using `xs[:-1]`, which excluded the last element of the list from the sum. I changed it to `sum(xs)` so it returns the sum of all elements in the list. 

The tests now pass.

transcript.result:
from solution import total
assert total([1,2,3])==6
assert total([])==0
print('OK_PASS')

transcript.final:
I've fixed the `total()` function in `solution.py`. The issue was that it was using `xs[:-1]`, which excluded the last element of the list from the sum. I changed it to `sum(xs)` so it returns the sum of all elements in the list. 

The tests now pass.
